NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. MATTHEW B. LEE OF BRAYTON & PURCELL, TEL. NO. 898-1555 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE LAW FIRM OF BRAYTON & PURCELL'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS FRANCES BANDUCCI AND ROXANNE BANDUCCI'S IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THERE IS NO ADEQUATE RECORD THAT THE PLAINTIFFS ARE AWARE OF WHAT IS AT STAKE OR IN THEIR BEST INTEREST TO HIRE A COUNSEL AND ADVISE COUNSEL IN THE FUTURE TO PROVIDE MORE INFORMATION IN THEIR DECLARATION. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
